status_notes: Japanese full text is freely accessible for the MHLW guideline. No usable English full text found for either document — MHLW's English site root returned HTTP 403 to automated fetch (bot-protection); METI's hosting of the companion provider-facing guideline also returned HTTP 403 on every attempt.
official_name: Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare, Japan
notes: These two guidelines are informally known together as the '3 Ministries / 2 Guidelines' framework for healthcare information security (MHLW + METI + MIC).

match_nodes.description: Guidelines on Safety Management of Medical Information Systems — healthcare-provider-facing information security guideline

data.official_name: Guidelines on Safety Management of Medical Information Systems
data.notes: First issued 2005, continuously revised. Current edition (as of research, 2026-07-16): Version 7.0 (June 2026), superseding Version 6.0 (May 2023). Multi-volume: Overview, Management, Planning & Administration, System Operations, Maintenance Outsourcing (5 companion PDFs). The foundational healthcare-sector guideline mandating cybersecurity, access control, and business-continuity requirements for medical institutions (hospitals/clinics) handling patient information systems. Companion to the provider-facing 'medical-info-provider-safety' node below.

urls.note: Japanese-language source page hosting the current 5-volume PDF set. Freely accessible.

match_nodes.description: Guideline for Safety Management of Information Systems and Services Provided by Operators Handling Medical Information — extends healthcare security requirements to third-party IT/cloud vendors

data.official_name: Guideline for Safety Management of Information Systems and Services Provided by Operators Handling Medical Information
data.notes: Jointly published by METI and MIC (not MHLW, despite being grouped here as the companion healthcare-sector document). First published August 2020; revised to v1.1 July 2023; a v2.0 draft/revision cycle ran Oct 2024 public comment through publication around March 2025. Extends the MHLW guideline's requirements (medical-info-systems-safety node above) to third-party IT/cloud vendors and system integrators hosting or processing medical information on behalf of healthcare providers — directly relevant to cloud security since it covers cloud service providers' shared-responsibility obligations. Japanese-only; no English version found.

urls.note: Version 2.0 (March 2025). Blocked (HTTP 403) to automated fetch as of 2026-07-16 on meti.go.jp.
MIC's companion notice page — not confirmed blocked.
